releases.author: peacewalkerT
releases.description: Bumped minAppVersion to 1.2.3 to match the ButtonComponent.setDisabled API in use. Removed unused encodeConnectionCode (already cleaned in b97d207). Cleaner description string without em-dash.

releases.author: peacewalkerT
releases.description:
## Changes

- Move all inline styles to `styles.css` (class-based)
- Drop `h2` heading from the settings tab

Prep for Obsidian community plugin registry submission — aligns with Obsidian plugin guidelines.

## Install

Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/rodin-export/`, then enable the plugin in Obsidian's community plugins list.

releases.author: peacewalkerT
releases.description:
## Changes

- Tighten `MAX_CHARS` to 60,000 to match server-side processing cap (prevents wasted upload for oversized vaults)
- Fix scan loop early-abort bug: a single oversized file no longer causes all subsequent files to be skipped
- Server-side character cap enforced on `/api/import` (belt-and-braces against client bypass)

## Install

Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/rodin-export/`, then enable the plugin in Obsidian's community plugins list.
